task_completion.description: Create a graph titled 'Most Deviant Metrics' with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graphite UI, look for a graph with the exact title 'Most Deviant Metrics'. The target input field or legend should show 'aliasByNode(mostDeviant(servers.*.cpu.*, 3), 1)'.

task_completion.description: Create a graph titled 'High Utilization Filter' with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graphite UI, look for a graph with the exact title 'High Utilization Filter'. The target input field or legend should show 'currentAbove(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*, 15)'.

task_completion.description: Create a graph titled 'Fleet CPU Envelope' with both max and min series targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graphite UI, look for a graph with the exact title 'Fleet CPU Envelope'. The target input fields or legend must show both 'maxSeries(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*)' and 'minSeries(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*)'.
The dashboard title at the top of the Graphite UI or in the save dialog should be exactly 'Outlier Detection'.
Look for a 'Dashboard Saved' confirmation popup, or the URL changing to reflect the saved dashboard name (e.g., /dashboard/Outlier%20Detection), or the save button indicating a saved state.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Graphite web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Graphite web UI in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) interacting with the Graphite API.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write the dashboard JSON in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) being used to manually construct the dashboard JSON file.

integrity.description: The graphs successfully render actual data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs in the dashboard should display actual plotted lines or data points, indicating genuine interaction with the metric backend rather than empty mockups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Dashboard Name: 'Outlier Detection'. Expected Graph Titles: 'Most Deviant Metrics', 'High Utilization Filter', 'Fleet CPU Envelope'. The agent must use the Graphite UI to configure these specific targets. The task relies on real AWS CloudWatch and EC2 server time-series metrics.
